title: Pan-Seared Cod with Citrus Medley
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared cod, served with a citrus medley.
instructions: 1. Rinse the cod fillets and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Season the cod with salt, to taste.
4. Add the cod to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
5. Serve the cod with a squeeze of citrus medley.
6. Garnish with additional citrus slices, if desired.
